prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-PIRATESHIP-RED Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: KidPlay Products Kids Light Up Pirate Ship Adventure Toy Real Sounds, Red Description: Ahoy Mateys. Go on an adventure with the KidPlay Products Boys Pirate Ship Toy Play Set.

Learn how to be a pirate while you play with your kids;

This fun pirate ship toy for boys comes with 3 pirate action figures for young kids to play with. The toy pirate ship lights up and makes real pirate sounds when the anchor button is pressed. The pirate ship uses (3) "AA" 1.5 volt batteries (included) for hours of fun. Young kids will love sailing the pretend seas with their very own pirate ship and pirates. This is a great gift idea this holiday season.

Suitable pirate toys for kids 3-5 and up. Search Terms: role playing bath tub toys for boys pretend play indoor action figure outdoor play christmas gift holiday toy list 2024 hanukkah gifts stocking stuffer sailor learning and educational toys light up Features: - HOURS OF ENTERTAINMENT: This pirate ship toy play set is filled with excitement and adventure for your little ones while their role playing with their friends. It allows your kids to learn and have fun with this must-have educational toy - ACTION FOR THE BOYS: Lights and Sounds abound as the pretend play pirate boat toy set makes sail across the ocean as the anchor is lifted out of the water. Combine 2 boats for an epic tail of a pirates war on the high seas - RED AND BLACK: The colors and names of the most feared pirates of the high seas come to life with your childs most imaginative stories. Help the Scurvy Boys find their way home and out of trouble in your next adventure - SPECIFICATIONS: Suitable for Ages 3 and up; Constructed of durable plastic for hours of fun; Operates on (3)1.5 volt batteries (included) - TOY SET INCLUDES: KidPlay Products Pretend Play Pirate Ship and (3) Pirate Action Figures === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: KidPlay Products Red Pirate Ship Toy with Lights and Sounds

tokens.name: Pirate Ship Toy with Lights and Sounds

openai.item_name: KidPlay Products Red Pirate Ship Toy Play Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Includes 3 Action Figures, Light Up And Real Sounds, Battery Operated, Ages 3 And Up, Educational Pretend Play

openai.title_differentiation: Lights And Sounds, 3 Action Figures, Battery Included, Durable Plastic, Pretend Play, Ages 3 And Up
